## Meeting Purpose

[Product deep dive on Relay Financial's banking platform for small-to-medium businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Relay offers up to 20 checking accounts and 2 savings accounts with no minimum balance requirements](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Platform focuses on cash flow clarity, backed by the Profit First method](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Extensive card controls allow granular spending limits, vendor restrictions, and approval workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Integrated invoicing, bill pay, and expense management features streamline financial operations](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)
  - [QuickBooks, Xero, and other key integrations available for seamless accounting workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=2977.0)

## Topics

### Platform Overview and Account Structure

  - [Dashboard shows total and available balances, pending/posted transactions](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Up to 20 checking accounts, 2 savings accounts with no minimum balance](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Easy fund transfers between accounts, external account linking via Plaid](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Auto-transfer rules support Profit First method for allocating income percentages](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

### Card Management and Controls

  - [Physical and virtual cards with customizable designs](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [Granular spending controls: limits, vendor restrictions, category blocks](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Backup account feature to prevent declines by sweeping funds](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Pre-approval workflows and international usage controls](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

### Payments and Invoicing

  - [ACH, wire, and check payment options with tiered transaction fees](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Built-in invoicing tool with customizable templates and online payment acceptance](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=2692.0)
  - [Bill management features for tracking due dates and approval workflows](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=2507.0)
  - [Third-party check writing support with integrated dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)

### Expense Management and Integrations

  - [Receipt capture and categorization tools](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)
  - [Direct integrations with QuickBooks, Xero, Gusto, and other platforms](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=2977.0)
  - [Auto-syncing of chart of accounts, vendors, and expense categories](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=3024.0)

### Team Management

  - [Customizable permission levels for employees and external advisors](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=3048.0)
  - [Roles include read-only, cardholder, manager, administrator, and super administrator](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=3069.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review detailed pricing and transaction fee information (to be sent by Sina)](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=3237.0)
  - [Explore potential use cases and benefits for Relay's target audience in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=3259.0)
  - [Follow up with any additional questions on specific features or integrations](https://fathom.video/share/AkDSSKt3Vf29rWvTCzis5-K1sYsTu4zT?tab=summary&timestamp=3259.0)
